text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... I lost?! Me? ...Seriously?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
This has gotta be a dream. Some kinda terrible
nightmare...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Oh, no, I don't think so. I've never had a dream this sweet.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You might've had the edge if it was a mile race,
but 2,000 meters is a different story!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka got stronger running in the Derby, but
Daiwa Scarlet has shown even more growth.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You've really built up your stamina. I've always
known you had more than me...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
But now it's like ya don't get tired at all. What
kinda trainin' have you been doin'?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I just kept running. Morning, noon, and night. I
put in the most effort in the smartest way
possible.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That's it? How boring...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Yeah. It was boring! But I did every boring thing necessary to get where I am!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: That's my weapon. It's something you don't have and never will.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I kept honing that weapon, and that's how I beat
you!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... I probably don't have the patience for
that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Proud of her victory, Daiwa Scarlet giggles.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
This is still only the beginning. Next is the Arima
Kinen at the end of the year!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: It's 2,500 meters, which is where I really shine.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you the best I can be. Well? Are you
scared yet?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Like hell I'm scared! You got lucky today!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
In any case, I plan on running in the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup before that.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
If you can, run with me. I'll run against you any
day.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right. Let's do it. I dunno about the Queen
Elizabeth, but I'll be at the Arima Kinen at the
end of the year! And that's where I'll make my
comeback!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hmph. It's your turn to chase after me now. Later!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Hm, hm, hmmm! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet practically skips off, looking
genuinely happy.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Losin' may have been pathetic, but I still had a
bunch of fun. This... isn't so bad.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
When I compete with her, I throw myself
completely into it and forget about everything
else.
choice_data_list: She's getting a lot stronger, though.
She's getting a lot stronger, though.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah, and that's not all.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I think she's starting to see it. Maybe even more
than me.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Ah, never mind, it's nothing. In any case, will ya
let me race against her in the Arima Kinen?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I feel like I'm gonna learn somethin' important
there. Somethin' for the future me.
choice_data_list: Yeah. Let's go to the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Heheh. Thanks, Trainer. Man, Scarlet's always so
annoying...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I'm takin' wins for the rest of the year. If she's
bringin' the heat, then I gotta answer in kind!
